beats.name: Ordinary World
beats.description: The hero's normal life before the adventure.

beats.name: Call to Adventure
beats.description: A challenge or quest is presented.

beats.name: Refusal of the Call
beats.description: The hero hesitates or refuses the challenge.

beats.name: Meeting the Mentor
beats.description: The hero gains guidance, confidence, or tools.

beats.name: Crossing the Threshold
beats.description: The hero commits to the journey and enters the special world.

beats.name: Tests, Allies, Enemies
beats.description: The hero faces obstacles and learns the rules of the new world.

beats.name: Approach to Inmost Cave
beats.description: The hero prepares for the major challenge.

beats.name: The Ordeal
beats.description: The hero faces the greatest challenge yet (death and rebirth).

beats.name: Reward
beats.description: The hero seizes the prize or treasure.

beats.name: The Road Back
beats.description: The hero begins the return journey, facing new dangers.

beats.name: Resurrection
beats.description: The hero faces the final test using all lessons learned.

beats.name: Return with the Elixir
beats.description: The hero returns home transformed with the gift for the world.
